perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a wide shot of a crowd in a large event space, featuring many individuals holding professional cameras and smartphones pointed toward an unseen center of attention. A large blue screen in the background displays a brand logo. (2) The camera pans smoothly to the right, showing rows of gold-framed chairs and a dense audience of photographers and fans, some crouching and some standing, all focused on the front. (3) The pan concludes by focusing on a male in a black beanie and glasses sitting next to a female with long hair in a denim jacket; both are smiling and posing for the cameras as people around them lean in to take photos.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music with a steady beat starts immediately. (2) Layered over the music, a chaotic mix of human voices is heard, with multiple people shouting "Here!" and "Look over here!" in Mandarin to get the attention of the subjects. (3) The combination of high-energy music and the loud, excited chatter of the crowd continues consistently until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: On the background screen, the text "Simply 新普利" is visible alongside a leaf-shaped logo, identifying the brand of the event.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Panning across crowd -> Focus on main characters

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Approximately 23 audience/media members and 2 main celebrity subjects in the center.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a black beanie, black glasses, and a black shirt; a female with long dark hair wearing a light blue denim jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional event setting featuring a large blue LED backdrop with brand logos, gold-painted chairs, and a crowded atmosphere of media personnel.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio/event lighting with occasional camera flashes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document the high-intensity atmosphere and media frenzy surrounding a celebrity appearance at a brand promotional event for 'Simply 新普利'. The video emphasizes the popularity of the subjects and the scale of the press coverage.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The prominent brand logo on the background screen and the formal seating arrangement suggest an official brand event.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a typical 'star-spotting' moment in East Asian celebrity culture, characterized by high-density media presence and synchronized attention.
